logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gmail skill

thoughts: I need to load the gmail skill using skills_tool:load.
The task specifies that this skill will auto-detect the number of days and take 5-15 minutes to complete.
I should wait for completion without interruption, then use notify-user to confirm success or failure.
Let me start by loading the gmail skill.

logs.heading: A0: Executing Gmail sync script

thoughts: The gmail skill has been loaded successfully. Now I need to execute it by running the python script at /a0/usr/skills/gmail/scripts/gmail.py.
The task specifies this will take 5-15 minutes, so I'll start the execution and then monitor for completion.
I'll use code_execution_tool with runtime=terminal to run the gmail.py script.
Since this is a long-running process that may block, I should also set up monitoring using runtime=output to check progress.
kvps.headline: Executing Gmail sync script

logs.heading: A0: Gmail sync completed successfully

The output file was created at /a0/usr/workdir/gmail-output.md with 41 summaries (min_relevance=7).
Now I need to load the notify-user skill and send the completion notification as specified in the task.

kvps.headline: Gmail sync completed successfully

logs.heading: icon://construction Loading skill notify_user
logs.content: Error: skill not found: 'notify_user'. Try skills_tool method=list or method=search.

logs.heading: A0: Sending Gmail sync completion notification

thoughts: The notify_user skill doesn't exist as a separate skill - it's actually a tool that should be called directly.
Looking at the task instructions, I need to use the notify_user tool (not skills_tool) to send the completion notification.
The gmail sync completed successfully with output at /a0/usr/workdir/gmail-output.md.
I'll now call notify_user with the specified message, title, and no priority set (success level).
Priority 4 is for failure cases - this was a successful completion so I won't set it.
kvps.headline: Sending Gmail sync completion notification

logs.heading: icon://construction A0: Using tool 'notify_user'
logs.content: The notification has been sent to the user.
